item.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
item.description: Focus: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.

item.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
item.description: Focus: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.

item.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
item.description: Focus: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.

item.title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP
item.description: Focus: Hugging Face Blog has a new AI-related update around 'Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

item.title: #493 – Jeff Kaplan: World of Warcraft, Overwatch, Blizzard, and Future of Gaming
item.description: Focus: Jeff Kaplan is a legendary Blizzard game designer of World of Warcraft and Overwatch, now preparing to launch a new game, The Legend of California, from his new studio Kintsugiyama – available to wishlist on Steam today, with alpha later in March. Thank you for listening ❤ Check out our spons

item.title: DiffusionGemma: 4x faster text generation
item.description: Focus: Google DeepMind Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'DiffusionGemma: 4x faster text generation', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: Investing in multi-agent AI safety research
item.description: Focus: Google DeepMind and partners announce a $10M funding call for multi-agent safety research.

item.title: #496 – FFmpeg: The Incredible Technology Behind Video on the Internet
item.description: Focus: Jean-Baptiste Kempf is lead developer of VLC and president of VideoLAN. Kieran Kunhya is a longtime FFmpeg contributor, codec engineer, and the person behind the now-infamous FFmpeg account on X. Thank you for listening ❤ Check out our sponsors: https://lexfridman.com/sponsors/ep496-sc See be

item.title: Gemini Omni: Clone yourself with AI in under 15 minutes
item.description: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Gemini Omni: Clone yourself with AI in under 15 minutes', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: Claude Fable 5 review: what the new Mythos model gets right (and very wrong)
item.description: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Claude Fable 5 review: what the new Mythos model gets right (and very wrong)', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: Fluid, natural voice translation with Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
item.description: Focus: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.

item.title: Introducing Gemma 4 12B: a unified, encoder-free multimodal model
item.description: Focus: Google DeepMind Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Introducing Gemma 4 12B: a unified, encoder-free multimodal model', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: Powering the future of robotics in Europe
item.description: Focus: Google DeepMind Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Powering the future of robotics in Europe', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

item.title: Essential books for product builders—part 2
item.description: Focus: 36 more timeless books that’ll make you a better builder, leader, and person

item.title: #491 – OpenClaw: The Viral AI Agent that Broke the Internet – Peter Steinberger
item.description: Focus: Peter Steinberger is the creator of OpenClaw, an open-source AI agent framework that’s the fastest-growing project in GitHub history. Thank you for listening ❤ Check out our sponsors: https://lexfridman.com/sponsors/ep491-sc See below for timestamps, transcript, and to give feedback, submit q

item.title: [AINews] Open Models, Model Labs vs Agent Labs, and What's Untrainable — Sarah Guo
item.description: Focus: a quiet day lets us reflect on a great essay

item.title: #495 – Vikings, Ragnar, Berserkers, Valhalla & the Warriors of the Viking Age
item.description: Focus: Lars Brownworth is a historian, teacher, podcaster, and author specializing in Viking history, medieval Europe, and the Byzantine Empire. item.title: Reality: The Final Eval — Lukas Petersson and Axel Backlund of Andon Labs
item.description: Focus: We talk with the VendingBench authors on evaling Claudes from Haiku to Mythos, and how they build leading, and lasting, frontier evals from scratch.
